---
title: "Territorial Seas (12nm)"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

Territorial Seas from the VLIZ Maritime Boundaries Geodatabase. Territorial seas are a belt of coastal waters extending at most 12 nautical miles (22.2 km; 13.8 mi) from the baseline (usually the mean low-water mark) of a coastal state.. Flanders Marine Institute (2023). Maritime Boundaries Geodatabase: Territorial Seas (12NM), version 4. Available online at https://www.marineregions.org/. https://doi.org/10.14284/633

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=LaL1TbV4SFGhn15RgGj6qQ&layers=NddnWv3mRN6CqHmmtTAeqw&layerNames=Territorial%20Seas%20%2812NM%29,%20%28version%204,%202023,%20world%29"></iframe>
```

:::
